overview: Based on the published agenda, this special meeting of the Wausau School District Board of Education was scheduled to address the election of board officers and appoint members to various committees and liaison positions. The meeting was expected to include action items for selecting delegates to state assemblies, appointing representatives to educational organizations, and establishing committee memberships for the upcoming term.

agenda.item: Election of Officers: Cale Bushman, Secretary Pro Tem Report from Deputy Clerk
Elect Delegate and Alternate Delegate to 2027 Delegate Assembly (January 20-22, 2027)
Elect Board Member Representative to CESA 9 Annual Convention (August 3, 2026)
Appoint Board Member to the Wausau School Foundation
Appoint Gifted and Talented Committee Member
Appoint Liaison to the Marathon County Extension, Education, and Economic Development Committee

discussions.body: Cale Bushman was scheduled to serve as Secretary Pro Tem, with a report expected from the Deputy Clerk regarding the election of board officers for the upcoming term.

discussions.item: Elect Delegate and Alternate Delegate to 2027 Delegate Assembly
discussions.body: The board was expected to elect a delegate and alternate delegate to represent the district at the 2027 Delegate Assembly scheduled for January 20-22, 2027. Action was requested for this item.

discussions.item: Elect Board Member Representative to CESA 9 Annual Convention
discussions.body: The board was scheduled to select a representative to attend the CESA 9 Annual Convention on August 3, 2026. This cooperative educational service agency represents regional school districts.
The board was expected to appoint members to serve on the union contract negotiating committee, which would handle collective bargaining matters for the district.

discussions.item: Appoint Gifted and Talented Committee Member
discussions.body: The board was scheduled to appoint a member to serve on the Gifted and Talented Committee, overseeing programming for advanced learners in the district.

publicComment: No public comment period was included on this agenda.
actionItems: Board was expected to vote on the election of officers
Action was requested for electing delegate and alternate delegate to 2027 Delegate Assembly
Action was requested for electing board member representative to CESA 9 Annual Convention
Board was expected to appoint a member to the Wausau School Foundation
Board was expected to appoint a Legislative Liaison
Board was expected to appoint a WECAN Consortium Committee Member
Board was expected to appoint members to the Union Contract Negotiating Committee
Board was expected to appoint a Gifted and Talented Committee Member
Board was expected to appoint a Liaison to the Marathon County Extension, Education, and Economic Development Committee
title: Special Meeting - 2026-04-27
